constructs.instructions_verbatim: Please select the pictures that you feel best represent the event described in the sentence, with your order of preference. Use 1 for the most preferred picture, 2 for the next preferred and so on. Please select a minimum of one picture for each sentence.
constructs.citation: Meteyard, L., & Vigliocco, G. (2009). Verbs in space: Axis and direction of motion norms for 299 English verbs. Behavior Research Methods, 41(2), 565-574.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate the strength of association between this verb and upward motion in space. Range: 1-5 (1 = weak association, 5 = strong association). Reply with one number.
